text:
Created attachment 185912
Update cacti to 1.1.20

Update cacti to 1.1.20
This is a bugfix release, no security updates - so no merge-quarterly required.

committer: please ignore portlint messages regarding gettext as cacti has internal gettext support.

Poudriere testport logs for 10.3/11.1 i386/amd64 located at:

https://poudriere.dan.tm/poudriere/data/latest-per-pkg/cacti/1.1.20/
